name: Tool Usage Correctness
description: Evaluates correct usage of tools throughout the pipeline. This rubric scores structural correctness and is partially automated via existing eval fixtures.

dimensions.name: tool_selection
dimensions.criteria: Are the correct tools called at the right pipeline phases? No unnecessary or missing tool calls?

scoringGuide.excellent: All required tools called at appropriate phases. No extraneous calls.
scoringGuide.good: Most tool calls correct. Minor unnecessary calls but no missing critical ones.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some wrong or missing tool calls but pipeline still functions.
scoringGuide.poor: Significant tool misuse. Critical calls missing or wrong tools used.

dimensions.name: argument_quality
dimensions.criteria: Are tool call arguments well-formed and complete? Do they contain all required fields with appropriate values?

scoringGuide.excellent: All arguments well-formed, complete, and semantically correct.
scoringGuide.good: Arguments mostly correct. Minor issues that don't break functionality.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some arguments missing or malformed but tools still usable.
scoringGuide.poor: Frequent argument errors. Tools would fail or produce wrong results.

dimensions.name: phase_completion
dimensions.criteria: Does each phase complete properly with the correct completion signal/tool call?

scoringGuide.excellent: All phases complete correctly with proper signals.
scoringGuide.good: Most phases complete correctly. Minor signal issues.
scoringGuide.poor: Phases frequently hang or complete incorrectly.

dimensions.name: context_usage
dimensions.criteria: Are context references used correctly? Does the agent properly reference previous phase outputs?

scoringGuide.excellent: All context references correct. Previous outputs properly utilized.
scoringGuide.good: Most context usage correct. Minor reference errors.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some context ignored or incorrectly referenced.
scoringGuide.poor: Context barely used. Agent operates in isolation from previous phases.
